horoscope: A steady approach is a good idea today, dear Aries, with your ruling planet, Mars, and Saturn coming together in your sign. Gaining a strong sense of what you can and cannot do is important now, not by lowering your standards or abandoning your dreams, but by getting a better grip on reality. This transit reminds you to take better care of yourself, follow the rules, be thorough, and take matters step by step to get things right. Bringing more realism into the picture is the key to feeling empowered now. If you’re left to your own resources, you will likely discover you can hold your own! After all, self-reliance is a valuable skill. Try to simplify and focus on the practical, as this can be the start of a new and improved plan of action, even if it currently feels like a slowdown. You may need to get serious about a personal matter. Aim for self-discipline and consider the long-term benefits of an orderly approach. While there will continue to be a strong emphasis on your sign, the Sun moves out of Aries today and into your resources sector for a stay of about a month, and life is about settling in and making yourself both comfortable and secure.

Mars and Saturn meet today in the sign behind yours, dear Taurus, making it wise to slow down if you've been overdoing things. You may need to own up to an issue you previously swept under the carpet or otherwise overlooked. Or, making a personal sacrifice to help out someone can be a theme. You might feel overruled now, but you can build significant strength from this, as it can motivate you to make significant changes. Devising strategies and considering what you want to accomplish down the road helps you avoid pushing something too fast. The need to be patient can emerge, and once self-discipline kicks in, it feels great. Focus on building strength and moving toward your goals in a more orderly, steady fashion. The Sun begins its transit of your sign today, putting you in charge. Your independence, personality, image, and general attitude are in the spotlight in the month ahead, and if there’s a time of year for reinventing yourself, this cycle is it.

Mars and Saturn join forces in your social sector today, dear Gemini, and you might experience a reality check in a friendship, group association, or with a special project or long-term goal. You may need to lay down the law or put on the brakes temporarily before moving ahead. This transit reminds you to consider your limits! Pacing yourself can benefit you, even if it initially feels restrictive. A need for maturity can emerge, and it is your very best bet for surmounting obstacles right now. Saturn reminds you of a rule, responsibility, or obligation. Through its influence, you may come to see that one of your dreams or an ideal needs refinement due to practical considerations. For best results now, adopt a step-by-step approach to solving a problem. This may seem counterintuitive, but steadying yourself today is a good strategy. Also today, a month-long cycle begins as the Sun enters your solar twelfth house. During the period ahead, you can experience a greater need for a break from competitive energies or demanding situations. You gravitate to restful, relaxing, and healing activities.

The energies of today's meeting of Mars and Saturn at the top of your solar chart have been building, dear Cancer, and this points to a reality check of sorts. A goal that you've been gunning for may now seem imminent, or it may come to pass, but the details that you overlooked in the past are now emerging. You're in a better position now, but you could feel slightly overwhelmed. With pressure coming from all angles, you might decide to make a stand or dig in your heels and resist. A cautious, mindful approach in business is necessary now. You may need to lay down the law if you're in a position of authority. In truth, you can develop very practical, workable long-term life strategies and plans — the key is to be patient and focus on the goal. It might be necessary to make personal sacrifices to overcome a hurdle. Eliminating waste in your professional life can be especially helpful now, and you may need to assess the viability of a project/goal to know your next step. Also today, the Sun enters your sector of friendships, wishes, and hopes, and will continue to visit this house of your solar chart until May 20th. This cycle stirs your need to connect with people who share common aspirations, or it reignites the flame of your own goals and hopes.

With Mars and Saturn coming together in your spirit sector today, dear Leo, it may be time to face reality or handle a responsibility. Overcoming an obstacle in your life can be a focus. You’re in a great position to study or learn something worthwhile, and with a clearer outlook, you get in a better place to make adjustments and plans that are genuinely doable. Pacing yourself is best with this grounding, stabilizing influence. However, it also calls upon you to exercise some self-discipline. In other words, it gives back as long as you put in the effort! It’s best to deal with problem areas head-on. Do your best to focus on a game plan or strategy rather than dwell on the frustration of current obstacles. You’re putting your life into better order now, which will ultimately be a relief. Also today, the Sun enters your reputation and career sector, where it will stay until May 20th. You are more goal-oriented at this time of year and especially invested in your performance, responsibilities, accomplishments, and image.

You could be getting a push to become more organized and take better care of yourself, dear Virgo, with Mars and Saturn meeting today. This influence may come as a reality check on a financial or intimate level. It's now time to make up for past procrastination or glossing over vital details. You might aim to work on refining and fine-tuning plans, while drawing on maturity and common sense. It's best to focus your energies on problems you can solve with a step-by-step approach. Under this influence, traditional or cautious methods are likely to work best. Drama in your personal life is possible, but avoid getting caught up in a tug-of-war when you can use your energy more constructively. Because this alignment occurs in your intimacy sector, you may need to put some work into a relationship, and it's a good idea to consider what's best for the long term, not just for the time being. Shared finances or support can be a source of stress, but it's a good time to work on plans to improve your situation. Today’s movement of the Sun into your adventure and expansion sector begins a month-long cycle in which you seek out wonderful ways to feel and be free.

There can be heavy energy with a partner or significant person, dear Libra, as Mars and Saturn meet in your opposite sign. Instead, putting extra effort into a relationship can be in focus. Responsibilities to others can feel weighty, or someone may seem to be blocking you or otherwise in your way! The reality of a relationship or a person in your life can come into focus. Aim to be as patient and mature as you can for the best results. If a relationship or project withstands pressure, it can be a time to develop a new and improved plan. It’s important to be fair and to meet others halfway, and if you’re getting the short end of the stick, examine whether it’s temporary or ongoing. Instead, you can put real effort into a significant practical pursuit at this time, and it’s wise to focus on the end goal rather than the frustration of the tasks at hand. Also today, the Sun moves into your solar eighth house for a month-long visit. The coming weeks can spotlight your ability to share and blend with a partner or to better understand yourself as you face the need to improve, change, and transform.

Mars and Saturn join forces in your work and health sector today, dear Scorpio, and your duties require more attention, diligence, and concentration than usual. Instead, a roadblock or slowdown reminds you that long-term success requires pacing yourself. Look for ways to simplify so that you can move forward in the best possible direction. Putting in extra effort, following the rules, and facing realities are all important and are more likely to lead to good things, even if you’d rather be doing something else! Facing up to facts with work and health matters helps you make solid, genuinely doable plans of action. In truth, it’s a good time to solve problems, perform, and overcome emotional hurdles. It can be challenging to cut certain things out, but it is satisfying to know you’re taking better care of yourself. Fortunately, a new solar cycle begins today, spotlighting your one-to-one relationships, whether personal or business, or both. This month-long cycle is a warm one, enhancing your approachability and helping restore a healthy sense of balance in your life.

With Mars and Saturn joining forces today, dear Sagittarius, there could be a reality, slowdown, or block in a relationship or creative project. While your enthusiasm might dip, it's temporary. Keep in mind that a reality check now can better support you in the future. You'll quickly realize it's a good time to draw up solid plans and take things one step at a time based on new, more realistic expectations. There may be some hurdles to clear, but they're surmountable, and it can be easier to meet goals with the motivation that comes from a stronger sense that you can discipline yourself and take charge. Your interactions could be on the serious side with this transit, but if things seem complicated now, take the time to digest and process rather than react too quickly. If unflattering elements of a relationship emerge, take time to process things. Also today, the Sun moves into your work and health sector, where it will stay until May 20th. The month ahead is a strong time to improve or start new routines that help you get into better form.

With Mars and Saturn joining forces in your home and family sector today, dear Capricorn, a block or restriction in your personal life is possible. Instead, current circumstances make it clear you need to bring more structure to your domestic life. Slowing down plans makes more sense than scrapping them, even if you experience waning motivation. Serious energy may surround household matters now, or you may need to face the reality surrounding living conditions. There can be hard work involved in getting a problem area handled, but even if it means some heavy hours, you may be actively working to improve your living conditions or home life, leading to long-term benefits. The focus now should be on strengthening, reorganizing, and rebuilding — slowly but surely. You'll ultimately feel good about acting responsibly and maturely, even if it means temporarily slowing your pace. With the Sun's move into your solar fifth house, a month-long cycle beginning today puts the spotlight on creative self-expression, pleasure, entertainment, and romance. The month ahead is strong for pursuing a pet hobby or starting a new one, for enjoying creative interests, for finding new avenues for expressing yourself, and for letting your inner child out to play.

Mars meets Saturn in your communications sector today, dear Aquarius, signaling a time of increased responsibility. Conversations occur about important topics, or you become aware of details that need special attention. It might also be a time to go all-in on a particular project or learning pursuit. Saturn demands a mature, cautious approach to what you're doing, as it wants long-term stability! For best results, approach problems one at a time and step by step. Better communication or improved transportation channels are in the works, and current hurdles can motivate you to make these improvements. There are rewards to putting in a little extra work and facing reality now. Fortunately, the Sun’s move into your sector of home and family stirs a stronger need to rest, restore your energy, and focus on activities that revolve around home, family, and heart. This month-long cycle is good for reconnecting with the need for inner peace and comfort, for enjoying quieter, perhaps emotionally safer activities, and for collecting your thoughts and centering yourself.

This can be a time to get serious about finances or face reality regarding money, dear Pisces. You can feel strongly about taking more control over your money, resources, or talents, which empowers you. With Mars and Saturn aligning in your resources sector, it’s a time to examine what you’re capable of doing to overcome obstacles. Shedding unrealistic dreams or expectations can be helpful now. Consider that your life will improve as you deal with the facts and avoid living in fear of what might or might not happen. Activities that enhance your feeling of being on top of things and in charge of your life are in focus. Hard work may be involved! Following the rules makes the most sense for now. You’re learning what’s most important to you with this transit, and you’re also seeing that you’re quite capable of handling a challenge. Facing financial realities helps you achieve financial stability and success. Also today, the Sun enters your communications sector for a month-long stay. In many ways, the coming four weeks are about learning, connecting, and communicating. It’s not just a time to branch out, but also to learn new things, satisfy your curiosity, and find more satisfying ways to reach out to others.
